title: Origin: Necromancer
description: A datapack that adds a Necromancer origin to the Origins mod.
body:
# **Necromancer**

Originates from a dark, mystical background, drawn to the forbidden arts of death and the undead.

### Resurrect
Revive tamed animals using a powerful revival tome crafted with their own blood. This dark ritual involves channelling their life essence into the tome, which, when invoked, restores the fallen creature to life. The bond between necromancer and animal deepens through this blood magic, ensuring their loyal companions are never lost for long.

When enabled you're able to revive your fallen comrades by performing the dark ritual.

### Blood Flask
To craft a Blood Flask, shift and right-click an empty bottle. This action will draw a small amount of your own blood into the flask, infusing it with potent life force.

### Revival Tome
To create an Incomplete Revival Tome, add a drop of your blood to a book in your inventory. This infusion will awaken the tome's latent powers, causing it to reveal a list of specific items required to complete its dark ritual. Gather these components to unlock the tome's full potential and harness its revival magic.

Youtube video (just showing abilities): https://youtu.be/-2AuWb1fp0E

## For Admins
You're able to enable this pack for hardcore mode: (default: off)
/function thi_necromancer:settings/hardcore/on
/function thi_necromancer:settings/hardcore/off

You're able to turn off player revival: (default: on)
/function thi_necromancer:settings/player_reviving/on
/function thi_necromancer:settings/player_reviving/off

### Authors note:
This pack requires a datapack and a resourcepack otherwise some of the text will not show up and the player models on the ground will not work.

This was the pack I made for the Dead Jam :D
